news.t: Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FELC is an equity ETF with a total of 252 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.24%, Apple at 7.11%, Microsoft at 4.27%, Amazon.com at 3.94%, and Alphabet at 3.70%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Large Cap Core ETF (FELC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in large-cap stocks belonging to a broad US equity index. The fund aims for growth of capital FELC was launched on Apr 19, 2007 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity announced the launch of six new active equity ETFs and reduced pricing on factor ETFs.
